heading: Naming or designating buildings
label: 3102 Naming or designating buildings
text: The Administrator of General Services may name or otherwise designate any building under the custody and control of the General Services Administration, regardless of whether it was previously named by statute.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)310240:298d., title IV, § 410, ; , , .June 16, 1949, ch. 21863 Stat. 200Pub. L. 85–54272 Stat. 399July 18, 1958The words “notwithstanding any other provision of law” and “rename” are omitted as unnecessary.
